title: Enchantments Overhaul
description: This mod adds a lot of new fun enchantments to Minecraft.
body:
# **New Enchantments**

## Magma Walker
This enchantment is like Frost Walker but for the Lava. It allows you to walk over lava and turn it into magma. It also makes you immune to damage by magma blocks.
Supported Items: Boots

## Bleeding Edge
This enchantment applies an effect to mobs which makes them bleed for a while.
Supported Items: Sword

## Evoke
This enchantment summons evoker fangs around mobs which attack the mob.
Supported Items: Sword, Axe

## Paralysis
This enchantment temporarily stops mobs from moving and attacking you for a few seconds based on the level of the enchantment.
Supported Items: Bow, Crossbow

## Combustible
This enchantment is a curse. When it is applied to a tool, the tool has a 10% chance to spontaneously explode destroying the blocks and entities around you.
Supported Items: Pickaxe, Axe

## Slowing Stare
This enchantment slows down mobs when you look at them.
Supported Items: Helmet

## Bane of the Amphibious
This enchantment deals extra damage to entities in water.
Supported Items: Sword, Axe

## Autosmelt
This enchantment automatically smelts blocks when you mine them.
Supported Items: Pickaxe

## Projectile Deflector
This enchantment deflects any projectile that touches you.
Supported Items: Chestplate

Run command "/enchantmentsoverhaul" for information on all the new enchantments added in this mod.
All these enchantments can be found in chest loots, villager trades and enchanting tables.
